transcript: Why don't you go piss in the ocean? What are you bothering me for?
We don't take anything like that, you idiot.
Bowel? What the hell's the matter with you?
Hold on a second, let me ask my boss. [in background] Bob! You want some elk bowel, or bronchial tubes? They've been cleaned out.
Obviously, I don't know what you're talking about. But I don't want any elk bowels, or bronchial tubes.
Well, why don't you come on down here and let me put a .38 in your brain?
